name: Number.Expanded

unions.name: Expanded
unions.comment: Expanded number can be Positive or Negative Infinity

values.name: map
values.comment: Not a Functor, but still mappable

values.name: withDefault
values.comment: Get the value out of `Expanded` providing a default for the infinite case

values.name: withDefaults
values.comment:
Get the value out of `Expanded` providing a default for the infinite cases.
First argument is the default for the `PosInfinity` case, the second is for `NegInfinity`
values.type: a -> a -> (number -> a) -> Expanded number -> a
